zh.Holme upon Spalding Moor, East Riding, Y: 英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾
zh.Holme upon Spalding Moor, Yorkshire, Eng: 英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton於大約1466年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Sothern28歲，母親Alice Spalding23歲。他於1499年與Elizabeth Luddham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年享年58歲。

zh-hans.Holme upon Spalding Moor, East Riding, Y: 英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾
zh-hans.Holme upon Spalding Moor, Yorkshire, Eng: 英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton于大约1466年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William Sothern28岁，母亲Alice Spalding23岁。他于1499年与Elizabeth Luddham在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sotherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Southerton
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more places called Southerton or Sotherton, including Sotherton (Suffolk), which derives from Old English sūtherra ‘southern, southerly’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Herman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Hermann , from a Germanic personal name derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. The name was in use among the Normans and was borne by many immigrants from the Low Countries in the 15th century. Perhaps because of that it continued in occasional use well into the 1700s. It was revived more generally in Britain in the 19th century, when it also became common in America, most probably as a result of the influence of German immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton was born about 1466, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Sothern, was 28 and his mother, Alice Spalding, was 23. He married Elizabeth Luddham in 1499, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1523, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton est né environ 1466, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sothern, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Spalding, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Luddham en 1499, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1523, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton um 1466 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sothern 28 und seine Mutter Alice Spalding 23. Er hat 1499 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Luddham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1523 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton è nato il circa 1466 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Sothern, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Alice Spalding, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Luddham nel 1499, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1523, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Herman Sothertonが約1466年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Sothernは28歳，母Alice Spaldingは23歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでElizabeth Luddhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton(이)가 대략 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sothern(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Spalding(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Elizabeth Luddham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton nasceu aproximadamente 1466, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Sothern, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Spalding, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Luddham em 1499, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1523, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton родился около 1466 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Sothern было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Spalding, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Luddham в 1499 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1523 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton nació aproximadamente 1466, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Sothern, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Spalding, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Luddham en 1499, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1523, a la edad de 58 años.
